prompt: In Mail, create a new mailbox named 'KinBench 146' (if not present) and move an inbox message into it. If you cannot find a seed inbox message, just creating the mailbox 'KinBench 146' is sufficient. Also write 'moved-to-folder' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/146-move-confirm.txt. Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail move_to_folder "KinBench 146" "KinBench 146"'` (subject and folder both 'KinBench 146') then write the confirm file.
